title: Measure a Resistor
description: Orion walks you through confirming a resistor's value with a digital multimeter.

dialogue.text:
Place the loose resistor on a dry surface and disconnect any power.
Put on safety goggles and set your digital multimeter to the Ω range.

With goggles on, hold the resistor by its body. Touch the black probe to one lead and the red to the other without letting fingers or probes touch.
The meter should settle near the color-band value; stop if it heats or the reading jumps.

options.text: It reads about what the color bands predicted.

dialogue.text: Nice work. Label the resistor, power down the meter, and unplug and stow the probes.
